headline: AI Writing Assistants: Grammar Checking, Style Enhancement, and Collaborative Authorship
description: AI writing assistants are the invisible co-authors behind much of what we read -- correcting grammar, suggesting better words, and rewriting sentences for clarity. From Grammarly's 50M+ users to Microsoft Copilot embedded in Word, AI-powered writing assistance has become a standard productivity layer.

citation.name: AI-Powered Writing Assistants: Grammar Correction, Style Enhancement, and Generative Rewriting (2024-2025 Comprehensive Survey)
Human-AI Collaborative Writing: Productivity, Style Homogenization, and Authorship Ethics
